message:
feat(inference): add natural language explanation generator

Template-based NL explanation of Bayesian evidence ledgers. Maps feature
names to human-readable phrases, adapts hedging to confidence level, and
separates supporting vs countervailing evidence. 12 tests.

Closes: process_triage-7h8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
